reapack.name: 7R Untrim Item to source Length (until other item edge).lua
reapack.desc: 7R Untrim Item to source Length (until other item edge)

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - intital

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - FFT based pitch detection. a bit better accuracy. - reduced the opacity of the filled colour - Smoothed the window change. - Waveform fade DB adjusted to -60 DB (values below will fade out naturaly without normalising)

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: added peak lines

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: Added peak hold and decay time sliders.

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: Added value readouts

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: no runaway value readouts below -120 DB

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: Text alignment

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: Added ITU filter

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: Added a bunch of unneccessary stuff, but hey it can show down to -316 DB peaks

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: Added sliders for range and division for the marking

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Added sliders for colour divison ranges - added text readout fade when no audio is palying - Peak lines now follow meter colour

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Added Peak/RMS, LUFS S, LUFS M modes - Increased Scale Max range

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - centered some elements

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - centered readout values

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - now numbering also obeys the divison parameter

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - added RMS and Peak hold line switches.

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - revised metering text. - added crest factor/dyanmics metering

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - revised metering accuracy - Added mouse hover value read out

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - slowed down crest factor read out value

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: Organised Data

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: added right click menu to enable/disable side channel spectrum added ITU-R 468 weighting (usefull for less bass response)

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: added RMS mode

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: added normalisation mode

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: added octave smoothening

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: normalisation now follows post smoothening

reapack.name: 7R Control Sends of Selected Track.lua
reapack.desc: 7R Control Send volume of Selected Track

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: Initial

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: consoldidated undo points

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: added pause to work with the GUI send manager script - Added send pan control syncing

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: Multiple sends to the same track bug is fixed. Controls each slot respectevely.

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: Mirrors mute states.

reapack.name: 7R Freeze Instruments to Stereo (Other FX Online).lua
reapack.desc: 7R Freeze Instruments to Stereo (Other FX Online)

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: Initial

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: -Unselects Folder tracks before freezing

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: -Names item to Track name + Frozen $freezecounter (hides the 1)

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: -Removed the channel count edit. Uses native freeze function anyway

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Multi instrument detection - FX before the first FX are now kept online, only FX after the instrument are frozen offline.

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Looped recording improved - fixed lane support - region lane handling improivemant. - On playback/recording end, last chord extends to fill the measure.

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Looped recording improved - fixed lane support (value at the top of the script) - region lane handling improivemant. - On playback/recording end, last chord extends to fill the measure. - Defaulted to item mode

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Initial

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Added bypass and offline state synchronization.

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Affects FX based on FX instance position. (made this the default behavior)

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - fixed error when selecting media item.

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Initial

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Added pause to work with other background send scripts

reapack.name: 7R Insert FX or Instruments or Track Template Under Mouse cursor (Track or Item, Master).lua
reapack.desc: 7R Insert FX/Instruments/Track Template Under Mouse cursor (Track or Item, Master)

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Added single pane view (Prefered for docking to the side) - Added Track Templates Section - Added Instruments Section - Option to disable mouse cursor targetting - Font size option

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Filter folder names in track template list

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Filter folder names in track template list - esc to close script

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - fixed esc not working properly

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Added option to add FX to all selected tracks/items

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Added "remeber last search term" setting

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - jsfx naming fix

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Single click inserts stuff

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - insertion to master track under certain conditions fixed.

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - If FX chain already open, doesnt float FX window.

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Text field is automaticaly focused for easier search.

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Arrow keys for search item navigation - Enter to insert highlighted instrument - Imgui Fixfor latest update

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Added file check for cache rebuild.

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Added "remeber last search term" setting - Font size setting

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - single click inserts stuff

reapack.name: 7R Insert Project or Take Marker at mouse pointer.lua
reapack.desc: 7R Insert Project/Take Marker at mouse pointer

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: Initial

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: Takes item offset into account

version.name: 1.o
version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Initial

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Fix note selection KS insert behaviour

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Improve Search and folder expansion behaviour

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - imgui error

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Added live mode. works outside of MIDI editor. follows selected track item under playhead, and highlights active KS during playback - Table view for loaded KSs

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Added display octave slider. default -1. - Some GUI performance optimizations.

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Focus Arrange Window after KS injection if the setting is enabled.

reapack.name: 7R Marker n Region Exporter (GUI)(Project, Take, Item relative, Source Relative).lua

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: Initial

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Removed Bar:Beat and Beats export options for debugging and revision. - Fixed item-relative marker filtering when time selection is active and item is not at project start.

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Added back Bar and Beat support - Fixed item-relative marker filtering when time selection is active and item is not at project start.

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Added Custom export option - Added Preset save and load options - Fixed some value bugs

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Preset bug fixes - Added Project start offset option - Fixed some value bugs

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - added warning message for project offset issues

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Removed decimal beat values for clarity

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Imgui update Fix

reapack.name: 7R MIDI AutoSend.lua
reapack.desc: 7R MIDI Auto Send for CC Feedback

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: Delay of 500 ms. Doesnt create send if folder.

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - If no midi item is detected, wont create send

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - only monitors trach channge, other chnages no longer recreate sends.

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - added recording detection to create send when midi is recorded.

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - added media item changes for detection

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Sends are now pre FX to ignore midi merge setting on some VSTis

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Stricter clean up when selection changes. - Added exit clean up

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Re; Stricter clean up when selection changes. - Re; Added exit clean up

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - initial

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Added Simple work/break timer with auto-start. -

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Work timer settings are now saved properly - Added double click on sliders to enter value directly via input box

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Break timer doesnt look at AFK status. - Replaced the arrow with double click to skip timer

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - imgui problem that didnt occur in testing for some reason.

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Excluded record arm state from active time to avoid inflating time when armed but not actually recording.

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Initialise

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Initialise

version.author: 7thResonance
version.changelog: - Added media file cleanup utility (experimental, use with caution)
